repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.database.mongodb: embed vs reference modelling, aggregation pipeline, compound and multikey indexes, sharding key choice, replica set read concern, schema validation
fix a Rust borrow checker error

retrieval_query: MongoDB document model embed reference aggregation pipeline compound index sharding key replica set write concern

validation_smoke.name: code.database.mongodb L3 validation smoke
signals: explain("executionStats") shows an IXSCAN instead of a COLLSCAN for the query
the aggregation pipeline reports the $match and $sort stages used an index before $group
a write with w:majority acknowledges only after a majority of the replica set persisted it
schema validation rejects a document that violates the required field rules

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.database.mongodb diagnosis smoke
signals: explain shows totalDocsExamined far exceeding nReturned, signalling a missing or unselective index
an aggregation spills to disk because a $group or $sort exceeds the 100MB stage memory limit
a chosen shard key produces a jumbo chunk and a single hot shard absorbing most writes
the working set no longer fits in RAM and WiredTiger cache evictions spike read latency
an unbounded array grows a document toward the 16MB BSON limit
